# AGENTS.md — Exobrain (study-vault)

<!-- Auto-generated by codebase-summary. Re-run to update. -->

## Project Overview

Exobrain is a personal knowledge base system currently in **design phase** (no implementation code yet). It ingests learning materials from 6 source types, converts them to Markdown, uses AI agents to refine content through a draft-then-promote workflow, and provides SM-2 spaced-repetition quizzing.

Specification documents are written in **Traditional Chinese (zh-TW)**.

## Directory Layout

```
study-vault/
├── personal-knowledge-base-design-v2.md   # Original design spec (standalone, comprehensive)
├── .kiro/specs/personal-knowledge-base/
│   ├── requirements.md                    # 22 formal requirements with acceptance criteria
│   ├── design.md                          # Architecture, components, interfaces, data models
│   └── tasks.md                           # 11 task groups — implementation plan
└── .agents/summary/                       # Generated documentation (see below)
```

### Planned Implementation Structure

When implementation begins, the knowledge base will use this structure:

```
_inbox/           → Staging area for new sources
_drafts/          → AI-generated draft concepts (awaiting human review)
concepts/         → Promoted knowledge assets (by category subdirectory)
sources/          → Processed source materials
  ├── repos/      → GitHub repos (via DeepWiki)
  ├── videos/     → YouTube videos
  ├── books/      → epub books
  ├── articles/   → Web articles
  ├── podcasts/   → Podcast episodes
  └── papers/     → Academic papers
quiz/             → bank.json (SM-2 scheduled quiz questions)
_index/           → Auto-generated indexes (concepts, topics, tags)
topics/           → Cross-concept learning paths
_scripts/         → All automation scripts
  └── prompts/    → 3 core AI prompt files
```

## Key Architecture Decisions

- **Draft-then-promote**: AI never writes directly to `concepts/`. All AI output goes to `_drafts/` first for human review. This is the most important constraint in the system.
- **Layer write constraints**:
  - `new-source` prompt → writes to `sources/` and `_drafts/` only
  - `promote-concept` prompt → writes to `concepts/`, `quiz/`, `_index/`
  - `weekly-refine` prompt → writes to `_inbox/` (reports), `quiz/`, `_index/`; **cannot modify `concepts/`**
- **Stateless quiz logic**: `quiz_session.py` has no I/O (no `input()`/`print()`), enabling reuse across CLI, Discord, Telegram bots.
- **SM-2 defaults**: ease_factor starts at 2.5, floor at 1.3. Correct → interval *= ease_factor. Incorrect → interval = 1, ease_factor -= 0.2.

## Tech Stack

| Layer | Technology |
|-------|-----------|
| Pipeline orchestration | Bash scripts |
| Core logic | Python (Whisper API, SM-2, quiz, validation) |
| Web content extraction | Node.js (Readability + Turndown) |
| Data format | Markdown + YAML frontmatter + JSON |
| Speech-to-text | OpenAI Whisper API (`OPENAI_API_KEY` env var) |
| External tools | yt-dlp, pdftotext/Marker, deepwiki-to-md CLI |

## Component Map

### Ingest Pipeline (6 scripts)
| Script | Language | Source Type | Key Dependencies |
|--------|----------|-------------|-----------------|
| ingest-youtube.sh | Bash+Python | YouTube | yt-dlp, Whisper API |
| ingest-pdf.sh | Bash+Python | PDF | pdftotext/Marker |
| ingest-deepwiki.sh | Bash | GitHub repo | deepwiki-to-md CLI |
| ingest-article.js | Node.js | Web article | Readability, Turndown |
| ingest-podcast.sh | Bash+Python | Podcast | Whisper API |
| ingest-book.py | Python | epub | ebooklib/pandoc |

### Core Python Modules (8 modules)
| Module | Responsibility |
|--------|---------------|
| whisper_transcribe.py | Whisper API calls + SRT→Markdown |
| sm2_scheduler.py | SM-2 spaced repetition algorithm |
| metadata_validator.py | YAML/JSON schema validation |
| quiz_manager.py | Quiz bank CRUD |
| quiz_session.py | Stateless quiz session logic |
| quiz_cli.py | Terminal quiz interface |
| file_splitter.py | Markdown splitting (≤1MB chunks) |
| index_generator.py | Auto-generate concept/topic/tag indexes |

### Prompt Engine (3 prompts in `_scripts/prompts/`)
| Prompt | Trigger | Key Constraint |
|--------|---------|---------------|
| new-source.md | New source in `_inbox/` | Cannot write to `concepts/` |
| promote-concept.md | User approves draft | Feynman style, ≥2 quiz questions |
| weekly-refine.md | Weekly (manual/scheduled) | Cannot modify `concepts/` |
